mentions.note: Gold miner up 168% in 2025 on the surge in gold prices, though Cramer prefers Agnico Eagle within the group.
Gold miner leading gainers list is letdown; not best-in-class (Newmont > Agnico Eagle); symbol of narrow rally lacking growth stocks.

Largest gold miner with female CEO (first in 104 years); Cramer has CEO on show this weekend; caller interested in Newmont; Cramer open to story but prefers Agnico; gold mining exposure important long-term.
